accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as requiring states to provide observer access during federal elections.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes amendment to the Help America Vote Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes restrictions on observer conduct and conditions for removal.

effective_dates.why: No specific effective date clause; the Act took effect upon enactment and no sunset is specified.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including access requirements, observer restrictions, removal, definitions, and conforming amendments.

correct_entities.why: All committees and statutes correctly named.
